sharedPost.text:
MIDNIGHT VERANDA — Cinematic Country Wall Of Sound | No Copyright Music | No Content ID

Enter the warm and emotional world of MIDNIGHT VERANDA by Didier Junk — a cinematic instrumental journey through love, memory, longing, quiet summer nights and the timeless beauty of human connection.

Inspired by intimate country ballads, Americana landscapes and monumental Wall Of Sound orchestral storytelling, this soundtrack combines fingerpicked nylon guitar, soft piano, pedal steel guitar, tender fiddle melodies and enormous cinematic orchestral crescendos.

This is music for:
romantic storytelling
country atmosphere videos
cinematic productions
emotional documentaries
Americana visuals
love stories
sunset landscapes
slow travel videos
nostalgic memories
instrumental relaxation

MIDNIGHT VERANDA transforms tenderness, nostalgia and quiet affection into a gigantic cinematic experience filled with warmth, beauty and emotional depth.

This music library is available FREE for creators without Content-ID claims for standard YouTube and social media use.

If you want:
exclusive original tracks
premium cinematic versions
commercial licenses
extended editions
member-only soundtrack collections
direct support for the composer

please consider becoming a channel member of Didier Junk.

Perfect for:
Country Music • Americana • Wall Of Sound • Cinematic Orchestra • Romantic Atmosphere • Emotional Instrumental • Acoustic Guitar • Nostalgic Soundtrack • Love Story Music • Peaceful Relaxation

#CountryMusic #Americana #WallOfSound #CinematicMusic #InstrumentalMusic #AcousticGuitar #RomanticMusic #EmotionalMusic #CountryBallad #RelaxingMusic #NoCopyrightMusic #FreeToUseMusic #NoContentID #EpicOrchestra #Nostalgia #LoveStory #DidierJunk #OrchestralMusic #PeacefulMusic #CinematicCountry

**TYPE:** Non-union Commercial

**CASTING:** New Yorkers who wear prescription glasses

**LOCATION:** New York, NY

**COMPENSATION: **$700/10hr shoot day + $7500 buyout

**CONTACT:** broadcastcasting@gmail.com or use flyer QR to obtain audition instructions

**TIME(s):** shoot date range 6/2 - 6/5! Submission deadline 5/18, 4pm

**---**

**CASTING CALL** seeking local **NEW YORKERS** to feature in a commercial campaign for a major **EYEWEAR** retail chain shooting out of New York, NY. MUST wear prescription glasses + have a hobbie/job they can passionately speak about! Please see our flyer with the project details or reach out to us at broadcastcasting@gmail.com if you have any questions! **SUBMISSION DEADLINE:** Mon 18th May 2026

items.text:
CASTING CALL 'Sugarcoat'

Student film in association with The University of Edinburgh

Edinburgh-based actors ideal

A sister and a brother travelling back from their father’s funeral together stop for a picnic at a motorway services. The sister reflects on a stream of conflicting memories of her father.

Roles: 

sister (age: 25-35)

brother (age: 35-45)

father (age: 50-65)

Filming dates: June 21st-25th and possibly 13th-14th

CONTACT: s2565300@ed.ac.uk

attachments.ocrText: Puede ser una imagen de texto que dice "m COMTACT: S2565300@ED.AC.UK CASTING CALL 'SUGARCOAT' Student film in association with the University of Edinburgh SISTER AND A BROTHER TRAVELLING BACK FROM THEIR FATHER'S FUNERAL TOGETHER STOP FOR A PICNIC AT A MOTORWAY SERVICES. THE SISTER REFLECTS ON A STREAM OF CONFLICTING MEMORIES OF HER FATHER. ROLES SISTER FEMALE, AGE 25-35 BROTHER- MALE, AGE 35-45 MAIN CHARACTER YOUNGER SIBLING, SUCCESSFUL AND SELF-ASSURED OLDER SIBLING, LOST SPIRIT WHO IS PROFESSIONALLY UNSATISFIED FATHER MALE, AGE 50-65 SECONDARY CHARACTER INFLUENTIAL, SELF-DESTRUCTIVE FIGURE IN HIS CHILDREN'S LIVES *ACTORS *ACTORSARENOTREQUIREDTOBERELATED NOT REQUIRED"

items.text:
CASTING CALL — WICKED FRIDAYS 

NOC Theatre is seeking Black performers for the theatre production, Wicked Fridays, a dark psychological thriller exploring isolation, desire, survival, and the stories we tell ourselves to endure.

We're currently casting:

LEILANI (Female, 25–30) — British-Caribbean
ARIEL (Male, 18–22) — Caribbean accent required

 London
 Paid
 Auditions: 22–24 June
 Rehearsals: August
 Performances: October

To apply, send your:
• Headshot
• CV
• Spotlight Link (if applicable)

Email: noctheatrecompany@gmail.com

If you're drawn to psychologically intense storytelling, layered characters, and atmospheric theatre, we'd love to hear from you.

#CastingCall #BlackActors #BlackPerformers #TheatreCasting #LondonTheatre #ActorsUK #BritishTheatre #CaribbeanActors #StageActors #Auditions #PaidActingJob #WickedFridays

items.text:
My joint screening of 'Dreams' with Orson Welles at the London International Film Festival in 1978. After the event I travelled to the continent to meet again with Orson. 

At this point in his life he was quite bitter about the way the present Hollywood regime were treating him and he also told me all about his struggles with powerful political people in USA!

Short: Dreams, The Magic of Hollywood (Australia 1978/Dir Andrew Vial). Impressionistic documentary about Hollywood and stars, centred on the Los Angeles Film Festival. mins. 🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬

Project: The Green Frog  

Director: Khushik Mangal

Production Company: Chronic Pictures

Location: London / Surrey  

Shoot Dates: End July, 2026  

We are casting for a key role in our upcoming feature film:

Character: Lando LeDoux  

Gender: Male  

Age Range: 21–28

Requirements:  

– Must have long hair  

– Must be able to grow a beard  

– Strong screen presence and naturalistic acting style preferred  

This is a great opportunity to be part of an experimental, character-driven indie feature. 

📩 To apply, please send:

– Headshot  

– Showreel (if available)  

– Current photos (showing hair length)  

– Contact details

items.text:
Final Call for Death Eaters at Warner Bros Studio Tour London
I’m currently recruiting Death Eaters for our upcoming Dark Arts Feature at Warner Bros. Studio Tour London, the Making of Harry Potter ⚡️

Location: Warner Bros. Studio Tour, The Making of Harry Potter (via Allegis Global Solutions)

Contract: 7th August – 8th November

Working Pattern: 4-days p/week

Pay Rate: £14.50 / hour via PAYE

⚡️ You must be 18 and over and have right to work in the UK. There is no accommodation provided.

As a Dark Arts Feature Performer, you will use strong physical storytelling, movement, and characterisation skills to create high‑impact performances, working closely with choreographers, dance captains, and show management.

Critical dates:

Applications close - end of Sunday 7th June

Auditions (first round) - 20th to 22nd July

Auditions (recalls) - 23rd and 24th July

Start date - 7th August

Costume fittings - 10th - 21st August

Training - 27th and 28th August

Blocking rehearsals - 31st August to 4th September

Dress rehearsals - 14th and 15th September

Run commences - 16th September

Run ends - 8th November

You must be available for all dates specified (except Fittings where you will only be needed for 1hr slot within work week hours).

Link to apply is in comments below.

Best of luck! ⚡️🎬

Georgie Glover

Show Experience Manager

Hiring Manager

topComments.text: Neri Zaccardelli you would make an AWSOME death eater

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE 🎭

"There must be a place where my heart isn't a burden."

We are excited to announce casting for *A Place Not Mine*, an original fantasy musical about belonging, love, loss, and the things in life we cannot always avoid.

📍 Rehearsals: Middlesex University, London
🎭 Performances: The Drayton Arms Theatre
📅 29 & 30 November 2026

This is an independent, unpaid production. Should funding become available, any profits will be shared among the cast and creative team.

We are currently seeking performers aged 18–30 (35 for Sylas), as well as members of our creative team.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎭 AVAILABLE ROLES

✨ RIVEN
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Riven (Winx Club)
Intelligent, withdrawn and emotionally guarded.
Audition song:
🎵 Reflection – Mulan

✨ SERAPHINE
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Glinda (Wicked)
Bright, bubbly and seemingly perfect.
Audition song:
🎵 Once Upon a December – Anastasia

✨ ORIS
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Olaf (Frozen)
Loyal, optimistic and unintentionally funny.
Audition song:
🎵 This Wish – Wish

✨ SYLAS
Playing age: 25–35
Character reference: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)
Strict, intelligent and intimidating.
Audition song:
🎵 This Is The Thanks I Get?! – Wish

✨ ROWAN
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Kristoff (Frozen)
A sarcastic drama king who uses humour to survive awkward situations.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ ELARA
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Jade West (Victorious)
Sharp, intelligent and never afraid to speak her mind.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ AURORA
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)
Kind-hearted, supportive and emotionally open.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ SELENE
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Barbie (Barbie 2023)
Sweet, energetic and slightly chaotic.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎬 CREATIVE TEAM OPPORTUNITIES

We are also looking for:

✨ DIRECTOR
✨ CHOREOGRAPHER
✨ MUSICAL DIRECTOR

These positions are ideal for university students looking to expand their portfolio, gain practical experience, or complete placement requirements.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

Send us a DM on our instagram page at:

@a.place.not.mine

Actors should submit a self-tape performing the requested audition song.

Successful applicants will receive an invitation to an in-person audition.

We look forward to hearing from you.

💙 Find a place that's yours.

PERFORMANCES 29&30 NOVEMBER 2026 THE DRAY THEDRAYTON TON ARMSTHEATRE THEATRE ARMS CASTING CALL AGED AGED18-3 18- 30 NOFORMALTRAINING NOFORMAL TRAINING REQUIRED IRED SUBMITASELF-TAPE UBMIT ASELF-TAPE (REQUESTED ESTED SONG) (REQU DM DMUSTOAPPLY APPLY @A.PLACE.NOT.MINE @A.PLACE EACH UCCESSFUI APPLICANT WILL RECEIVE MESSAGE WITH AN INVITATION TO AN -PERSON AUDITION. +FINDAPLACET HAT''

🌐 [www.DinnerDetective.com/Spokane](http://www.DinnerDetective.com/Spokane) 🎟 Save with code DDSWA

Enjoy an interactive murder mystery dinner with comedy, audience participation, hidden clues, and a chance to solve the crime.

🌐 www.DinnerDetective.com/Spokane
🎟️ Use Code: DDSWA

⚠️ SPOKANE DETECTIVES NEEDED IMMEDIATELY FOR SATURDAY, JUNE 13TH ⚠️

We're investigating a crime, and the suspect is somewhere in the room.

Join Spokane's most unique night out for an evening packed with mystery, comedy, dinner, and audience interaction. No two investigations are ever the same, and every audience helps shape the experience.

🔍 Solve the Crime
😂 Laugh Out Loud

Can you catch the culprit before they get away?

items.text: Go behind the scenes of Hollywood’s golden age of voice over with legendary voice actor, coach, and demo producer Marc Graue. Tales From The Hollywood Voice Over Vault features unforgettable stories, rare behind-the-scenes moments, celebrity encounters, studio adventures, and lessons learned from decades in the entertainment industry. New episodes drop every week, taking you inside the world of voice over like never before! #voiceover #Hollywood #BehindTheScenesa ##HollywoodStories #voiceactor #marcgraue #legendary #voiceovercoach #studiostories #voice

items.text:
🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA** 

www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane

The Dinner Detective combines dinner, comedy, mystery, and audience participation into one unforgettable evening. The actors are hidden throughout the crowd, making every guest part of the experience.

Perfect for couples, friend groups, celebrations, and team outings.

Reserve your seats and see if you can solve the mystery.

sharedPost.text:
🌐 Book Now: https://www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane
🎟️ Use Code to save on June 13th: DDSWA
🚨 Spokane's most wanted event is back!

If you're searching for something beyond the typical dinner date, The Dinner Detective delivers an unforgettable night of mystery, comedy, and audience interaction.

You'll share dinner with suspects.
You'll gather clues.
You'll accuse the wrong person.
(Probably 😆)

The question is...Can YOU catch the culprit?

Grab your partner, friends, coworkers, or family and experience why guests keep coming back for more.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL - MDance Company Tour '27

Für „4Elemente“ suchen wir 1 Tänzerin / 1 Tänzer für die Tour 2027

🔸Gesucht wird:
•Starke Jazz-Technik
•Partnering-Skills
•Erfahrung in Modern / Contemporary / Commercial
•Teamplayer mit starker Bühnenpräsenz

🔸Proben: Osterferien 2027 in Bamberg
🔸Shows:
•7.4.2027 -  BAMBERG 
•17.4.2027 - ERBACH/ODW
•24.4.2027 – ANDERNACH 
•15.5.2027 - NÜRNBERG 
➡️ Bezahlung, Unterkunft, Fahrtkosten (innerhalb Deutschland, Österreich, Schweiz), Verpflegung an Showtagen 

🔸Bewerbung mit
•Anschreiben, indem du uns mitteilst, warum du Teil unseres Teams werden möchtest
•Aktuellem Lebenslauf
•Foto – Headshot und Ganzkörper
•Showreel / Videolink, falls vorhanden
an: 
🔸Melanie Day – Künstlerische Leitung von MDance Creative – info@mdancecreative.com

NUR SERIÖSE BEWERTUNGEN BITTE
 🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹

Casting Call | MDance Company Tour 2027

“4Elements” – A Dance Theatre Spectacle

The MDance Company is looking for one female / one male dancer for the 2027 tour production 

We are looking for
1 Male and 1 Female dancer with:
•Strong jazz technique
•Confident partnering skills
•Experience in Modern / Contemporary / Commercial 
•Strong stage presence
•Teamwork, reliability, and motivation

,🔸Rehearsals
Rehearsals will take place during the Easter holidays 2027 in Bamberg, Germany.
🔸Performances
April 7, 2027 – BAMBERG 
April 17, 2027 - ERBACH/ODW
April 24, 2027 – ANDERNACH
May 15, 2027 - NÜRNBERG 
➡️ Pay, accommodation, travel expenses(within Germany/Austria/Switzerland), food on showdays

🔸Application
Please send your application including:
•Cover Letter telling us why you would like to become part of our Team
|current CV
|photo – Headshot and Full Body
•showreel / video link, if available
to:
🔸Melanie Day – Künstlerische Leitung von MDance Creative – info@mdancecreative.com

SERIOUS APPLICATIONS ONLY PLEASE 

We look forward to your application!

items.text:
!!!  UWAGA  !!!  PILNE !!!  WARSZAWA   !!!   GLINIARZE  !!!

Do czerwcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

1. Gangster 2 (20-25) – masywny. Rola z tekstem.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
🇵🇱🇵🇱
Jeżeli polski rząd toleruje fakt nadania przez prezydenta Ukrainy imienia „Bohaterów UPA” jednej ze swoich jednostek, w tym samym czasie polscy politycy wykrzykują w Sejmie hasła „Sława Ukrainie”, a wicemarszałek Senatu idzie do ukraińskiej stacji telewizyjnej tylko po to, aby krytykować prezydenta za próbę odebrania Zełenskiemu Orderu Orła Białego – to dalsza walka o pełne zrealizowanie mojego projektu mija się z celem. Mam jednak nadzieję, że kiedyś uda mi się w pełni zrealizować mój zamysł i Lilka ożyje na małym czy dużym ekranie bądź na deskach polskich teatrów, czego sobie oczywiście życzę z całego serducha. 
Trzymajcie mocno kciuki! ✊🏼✊🏼 

#projektlila 

#cezaryandrzejkrajewski

Poszukiwana Lokacja | Łódź
Cześć Wszystkim!

Do realizacji etiudy reżyserskiej studentki łódzkiej szkoły filmowej szukamy domu do wynajęcia do zdjęć, dostępnego w terminie 30.06-03.07

Bardzo zależy nam na:

• Jasne przestrzenie z charakterem

• Mile widziane domy w stylu stara willa lub świdermajer

• Duży ogród

🎏 Nie zamykamy się na styl domu, najważniejszy jest dla nas ogród 

Jeśli macie taki dom lub znacie wi wiecie że ktoś mógłby pomóc, proszę o wiadomość prywatną lub maila: z.kosmalska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl ze zdjęciami wnętrza i lokalizacją.

Płacimy ale wszystko jest do ustalenia już prywatnie :)

items.text:
SZUKAMY AKTORA DO TRUDNYCH SPRAW

SZUKAMY OSÓB Z DOŚWIADCZENIEM W INNYCH PRODUKCJACH Z PRAWEM JAZDY 

Wiktor Szymański (wiek kandydata 23-27 lat) – grafik komputerowy. Żonaty. Impulsywny, sympatyczny chłopak o przyjemnej aparycji. Ubiera się głównie w sportowym stylu. Aktor musi umieć prowadzić samochód.

Termin zdjęć: 11-13.06

Wszystko płatne gotówką na planie po zakończeniu zdjęć. Stawka do dogadania.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o komentarz pod postem lub wiadomość prywatną

Zgłoszenia można także wysyłać na e-mail: julia.lisowiec@polotmedia.pl

W temacie proszę wpisać Casting rola Wiktor

items.text:
**NOW CASTING UK CONTENT CREATORS** 📣

Paid commercial campaign for Sensodyne.

We’re looking for warm, engaging people who create content online, feel confident on camera, and genuinely experience sensitive teeth.

This is a social-first style campaign focused on real people and authentic conversation, so we’re much more interested in personality, relatability and ease on camera than polished influencer-style content or huge followings.

Lifestyle, wellness, food, parenting, reviews, everyday life, humour etc all welcome.

**Important note:**
This is NOT an influencer deliverables campaign and no posting to your own social channels is required.

**Shoot details:**
• London
• 2nd and/or 3rd July
• Likely 1–2 shoot days

**Fees:**
• £350 per shoot day
• £8,000 usage fee if featured in the final campaign

**If interested, please email:**
casting@casperblackcasting.com

**Please include:**
• Name
• Age
• Location
• Social handles
• Contact number
• A little note about your experience with sensitive teeth

Thank you!

Casper x

Please feel free to tag/share with anybody who may be a great fit ✨

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '@UKCONTENT CREATORS Let'sT Talk Let LetfaTa Talk Le Let alk Le L alk casting@casperblackcasting.com com asting.'

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – VOLUNTARY ACTING ROLES 🎬

Manchester Youth Film School is looking for three male actors aged 25–55 for our student thriller *"What She Can't Remember"*.

🔹 Man in the Trenchcoat
🔹 Police Officer 1
🔹 Police Officer 2

📅 Wednesday 17th June
🕔 5:00pm – 7:30pm
📍 Gatley Hill House & the field behind it

This is a voluntary role supporting young filmmakers aged 11–16 as they create their latest short film.

🎥 The completed film will be screened at the Odeon Cinema as part of the Manchester Film Festival.

If you're interested or would like more information, please email:
📧 [youthfilmschool@gmail.com](mailto:youthfilmschool@gmail.com)

TO BE SCREENED AT ODEON CINEMA AS PART THE MANCHESTER FILM FESTIVAL MANCHESTER FILM FESTIVAL Email for info: YOUTHFILMSCHOOL@GMAIL.COM MANCHESTERYOUTHFLMSCHOO_COU'

items.text: Any help or suggestions would be appreciated.

sharedPost.text: A Comedy Theatre Group is looking at entering a show into the birmingham comedy festival later in the year and looking for a possible venue to host. Don't know really know the catchment area for the festival so any advice would be gratefully received.  We are a community theatre group with a very low budget and ideally looking for a community centre or church hall that might be suitable for our show. Thanks.

items.summary: Any help or suggestions would be appreciated.
items.title: Any help or suggestions would be appreciated.

items.text:
LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS
LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

ROLE DETAILS  

Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  

£50 daily subsidy per working day  

Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

AUDITION DATES  

London (Camberley Theatre) 

Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 

Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

LONDON 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125

MANCHESTER 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126

If you have any questions, please contact eventhr@lapland.group

🎬CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM – PAID 🎬

 

2x FEMALE ACTORS, LATE 20s. Shooting for 4 days, dates TBC. Chemistry reads this summer. Shooting in London. Paid as per BFI rates. Travel and accommodation not provided.

Contact mmmfilmcasting@gmail.com for more information.

TYPE: Short film

CASTING: 2x female actors, late 20s.

LOCATION: London, UK

COMPENSATION: Paid on par with BFI rates

CONTACT: mmmfilmcasting@gmail.com

DEADLINE: Tuesday 30th June

sharedPost.text:
💲 FOR SALE: 

ARRI M90 9K HMI High-Speed Kit - $10k

Includes everything on cart:
1x M90 HMI Head, 15 to 49° Focusing
     - 137 hours on head & one globe
1x EB MAX 6/9 Ballast
1x 4-Way Barndoors
2 x Head Cable: 50'
2x Osram HMI Digital 9000W Lamp
     - 1 used but in good condition, 1 entirely unused
1x Flight Case

All together goes for over $45k brand new

The light will be shipped via Southwest air cargo in a large Aputure rolling case, which is included with purchase.

Can provide more details if you message us - or available for local pickup. 

DM for more info, we’re happy to take videos or video call to show details!

items.text:
## 📣 CASTING CALL: NON-UNION TALENT (LOS ANGELES/LONG BEACH AREA) 📣

**PROJECT:** GardaWorld - ECAM + GWS _ B-roll Content Shoot 

**ROLE:** GWS Agent (General) 

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union 

**RATE:** Paid, Full Image Buyout

## 👤 PROFILE SOUGHT 
* **Quantity:** 1 Talent
* **Age/Look:** Young, multiethnic, fit, and confident (mid-30s-mid-40s would be ideal
* **Character Note:** No smiling (stern/professional demeanour).
* **Wardrobe:** Will require a full uniform and an Ambassador badge (provided on set).

## 📅** SHOOT DETAILS**
* **Date:** Monday, June 15, 2026
* **Location:** Near Long Beach Airport (LGB), CA
* *Local hires only (no travel or accommodation provided).*

## 📩 HOW TO APPLY

If you are available and fit the description, please submit by email to: **andreanne.fc@noba.com by Friday, June 5.**

**Subject Line:** GWS Agent - [Your Name]

**Please include:**
1. Full-length body photos (recent, clear lighting, no filters).
2. Your current measurements/sizes.
3. Your contact information.

🚫 **NO DMs PLEASE.** Direct messages on Facebook will not be reviewed. 
⚠️ *Due to the volume of submissions, only pre-selected candidates will be contacted.*

Thank you! 🙏

topComments.text: Andréanne Fluet-Chabot where's the love to the thickens hahahaha

items.text:
**DEVACURL BEAUTY CURLY HAIR STYLING TUTORIAL SHOOT**
**Culver City, California**

### CASTING CALL

**AUDITION DATE**
Monday, June 8, 2026
1:00 PM – 3:00 PM

**PAY RATE**
$560 Flat Rate

**SEEKING**

Female-identifying talent, ages 18–40s, including:

* Women
* Non-binary talent
* Androgynous talent
* Transgender talent

All ethnicities, heights, and sizes are encouraged to apply.

### HAIR REQUIREMENTS

* Natural shoulder-length hair or longer
* Curl pattern: **3A, 3B, or 3C**
* Natural hair colors only

**Not Accepted:**

* Extensions
* Wigs
* Hair pieces
* Obvious root regrowth
* Fashion colors (pink, blue, purple, green, etc.)
* Models under 18 years old

### PROJECT DETAILS

This is a **DevaCurl Beauty Styling Tutorial Shoot** featuring curly hair styling techniques and transformations.

The amount of styling performed will be determined collaboratively between the model and the artist.

**No haircut or color services will be performed.**

### AUDITION INFORMATION

**Date:** Monday, June 8, 2026
**Time:** 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM
*(Models may arrive anytime during audition hours.)*

### COMPENSATION

**$560 Flat Rate**

**DM for additional details and submission instructions.**

EPIZODYŚCI POSZUKIWANI 
Poszukujemy zdolnych Epizodystów Panów w wieku 35-40 do roli prezentera tv w reklamie samochodu

Prosimy o dostępność w dniach 9 i 10 Czerwca (Wtorek i Środa) będzie to jeden dzień zdjęciowy. 

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wiadomość 
e-mail: na adres statysci@profesjatv.pl  w temacie podajemy: AUTO

Wiadomość powinna zawierać: 
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek 
• aktualne zdajcie twarzy i sylwetki
• link do wizytówki YouTube 
• telefon kontaktowy  

Odezwiemy się do zaproszonych Osób ❗️PROSIMY O PILNE ZGŁOSZENIA ❗️

Stawka 800zł brutto za całość płatne po nagraniu 
Plan realizowany w Warszawie nie zwracamy kosztów za dojazd czy nocleg 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych; RODO dla PROFESJA TV 

Pozdrawiamy! 🙂

items.text:
**PILNY CASTING!!! - ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Bardzo pilnie, do zamkniętego serialu kryminalnego dla jednej z platform, poszukuję **CHŁOPCA w** **wieku 6-10 lat.**

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie. 

Rozpoczynają się w połowie lipca i potrwają do października 2026. 

Rola chłopca to ok. 10 dni zdjęciowych.

**Chłopiec to zapalony kibic, pełen energii łobuziak,  wysportowany i lubiący grać w piłkę nożną. **

**W zgłoszeniu bardzo proszę o przesłanie poniższych krótkich materiałów filmowych: **

1. Krótkiej wizytówki dziecka - imię nazwisko, wiek i krótką wypowiedź o swoich zainteresowaniach np. sport, gry itp.

2. Krótkie, spontaniczne nagranie kibicowskich przyśpiewek lub dopingu ulubionej drużyny piłkarskiej piłkarskiej.

Zgłoszenie proszę wysyłać poprzez formularz:

https://form.jotform.com/261513807079056

**ZGŁOSZENIA PROSIMY PRZESYŁAĆ D0 7 CZERWCA.**

**EWENTUALNE ZDJĘCIA PRÓBNE ODBĘDĄ SIĘ 13-14 CZERWCA W WARSZAWIE.**

items.summary:
**PILNY CASTING!!! - ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Bardzo pilnie, do zamkniętego serialu kryminalnego dla jednej z platform, poszukuję **CHŁOPCA w** **wieku 6-10 lat.**

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie. 

Rozpoczynają się w połowie lipca i potrwają do października 2026. 

Rola chłopca to ok. 10 dni zdjęciowych.

**Chłopiec to zapalony kibic, pełen energii łobuziak,  wysportowany i lubiący grać w piłkę nożną. **

**W zgłoszeniu bardzo proszę o przesłanie poniższych krótkich materiałów filmowych: **

1. Krótkiej wizytówki dziecka - imię nazwisko, wiek i krótką wypowiedź o swoich zainteresowaniach np. sport, gry itp.

2. Krótkie, spontaniczne nagranie kibicowskich przyśpiewek lub dopingu ulubionej drużyny piłkarskiej piłkarskiej.

Zgłoszenie proszę wysyłać poprzez formularz:

https://form.jotform.com/261513807079056

**ZGŁOSZENIA PROSIMY PRZESYŁAĆ D0 7 CZERWCA.**

**EWENTUALNE ZDJĘCIA PRÓBNE ODBĘDĄ SIĘ 13-14 CZERWCA W WARSZAWIE.**
items.title: **PILNY CASTING!!! - ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

** **

Zapraszamy osoby polskojęzyczne w wieku 17–60 lat do udziału w nagraniach programu jako publiczność!

8, 9, 11, 12, 15, 16, 18, 19, 22

🎟️ DM me or email matt@mzacting.com to grab your spot – only a few left!

items.text:
MALE ACTOR / DANCER URGENTLY NEEDED!

We are looking for a Male South Yorkshire based actor / dancer (18+) for our brand new show ‘Wig-Or-Mortis’ a drag-lipsync musical, never seen and never done before. 

The show will be premiering at Crookes Social Club on March 20th 2027 with a potential for other shows at other venues.

The role is UNPAID however travel costs can be discussed, distance dependent. The role requires acting and also dancing (neither are essential).

Get to work in a super fun environment with likeminded actors and constant collaboration.

Please fill out the form below to register interest or email tmcdonnell800@gmail.com for further information.

**[67117 - Gitarrist/in für Musical-Projekt gesucht]**

Für unser neues Musicalprojekt 

**SHREK – Das Musical**

suchen wir (Musicalgroup e.V.) nach Verstärkung für unser ehrenamtliches Musical-Orchester an der **Gitarre**!

* Notenkenntnisse vorteilhaft

* gemeinnütziges Vereinsprojekt ohne Gagen

* Geprobt wird ab Juli 2026 grundsätzlich jeden zweiten Sonntag in 67117 Limburgerhof bei Speyer

* Auftrittstermine: 8x im Januar 2027

Hast Du Lust?

Dann melde dich per PN oder unter
[casting@musicalgroup.de](mailto:casting@musicalgroup.de)

Let's get Musical!
Wir freuen uns auf dich.

#shrek #shrekthemusical #casting #gitarre #musical #rheinneckar #guitar #band

Bass Setup in Berlin 🎸🇩🇪
Fresh bass setup at Letelier Guitar Setup Berlin.
Every instrument is personally handled by Marcelo Letelier, professional musician, guitarist and guitar tech with 20+ years of experience.
A good bass setup can make a big difference: better action, better intonation, better tuning stability and a more comfortable feel for rehearsals, gigs and recording.
Bass setup service includes:
• Action adjustment
• Intonation
• Truss rod adjustment
• Bridge adjustment
• Fret polish
• Tuning stability check
• Basic electronics check
• General cleaning
If your bass has high action, buzzing, tuning problems or poor intonation, feel free to contact me.
📍Berlin / Neukölln area
🛠 Private workshop by appointment
👤 Setup by Marcelo Letelier
📲 WhatsApp: +49 151 24782561
📩 DM: @letelier.guitar.setup
Bass setup Berlin • Bass repair Berlin • Bass guitar setup Berlin • Guitar setup Berlin • Guitar repair Berlin • Guitar tech Berlin • Luthier Berlin • Bass Wartung Berlin • Gitarren Setup Berlin

sharedPost.text:
Pour un institut de soin et de bien-être, nous recherchons :
Critères généraux : modèles avec un grain de peau visible, au physique tonique, et surtout sans aucun tatouage.
- FEMME 1 : phénotype clair, blond vénitien, yeux clairs, environ 30-35 ans
- FEMME 2 : phénotype plus foncé, 40-45 ans
- HOMME : 35-40 ans, visage relativement émacié, physique tonique, "fit", sans poils

Disponibles le 15 juin dans la Vienne (Nouvelle Aquitaine). Résidents du département ou de la Région recommandé.
 
Merci de nous envoyer :
2 photos en portrait
2 photos en pieds
Lieu de résidence
Tel / mail
Expériences éventuelles

Date limite pour postuler : jeudi 6 juin
Candidatures à envoyer à candidature@nocast.fr
Objet : Casting soin et bien-être 15-06-2026

items.text:
⚽ NOW CASTING. DALLAS, TX!

We are looking for outgoing and friendly male bilingual (Spanish and English) Brand Ambassadors to join us for a super exciting Latin Dating App x FIFA activation in Dallas!

Dates: Sunday, July 6 + Monday, July 14 

Time: 1:00 PM – 7:00 PM both days

Location: Dallas, TX (details provided upon booking)

Rate: $35 per hr 

 Requirements:
* Ages 21-35
* Bilingual, English and Spanish required
* Outgoing, friendly, and professional, high energy a must!
* Reliable and punctual

Roles and Responsibilities: engage with attendees, educate guests about the app and promotion, assist with transportation coordination, and help facilitate a smooth and memorable guest journey from registration through ride departure and post-ride next steps.

TO APPLY:

DM @shesocorporate on INSTAGRAM with the word **"Dallas"** 

Thanks!

items.text:
EVC TALENT CASTING SHOW 2026 – JURYCASTING LIVE
Die Suche nach den außergewöhnlichsten Talenten beginnt.

Für die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 suchen wir Künstlerinnen und Künstler aus ganz Deutschland sowie den europäischen Nachbarländern, die mit Talent, Leidenschaft und Ausstrahlung überzeugen.

Am Samstag, den 20. Juni 2026, findet im XOX-Theater Kleve das offizielle Jurycasting statt. Bewerben können sich Solokünstler, Duos und Gruppen aller Altersklassen und Genres. 

Das Theater befindet sich in der Briener Straße 6–14, 47533 Kleve.  

Gesucht werden Talente aus den Bereichen:

• Musik

• Tanz

• Akrobatik

• Comedy

• Artistik

• Entertainment

• Showacts

• und viele weitere kreative Darbietungen

Jurycasting Live

20. Juni 2026 | 12:00 – 17:00 Uhr

XOX-Theater Kleve

Briener Straße 6–14

47533 Kleve in Nordrhein Westfalen 

Interessierte Talente können sich vorab online anmelden oder am Veranstaltungstag ohne vorherige Bewerbung direkt vor Ort vorsprechen.

Online-Bewerbung:

www.electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html

Nutzen Sie die Gelegenheit, Ihr Talent auf einer professionellen Bühne zu präsentieren und Teil einer einzigartigen Showproduktion zu werden.

Egal ob aus Deutschland, den Niederlanden, Belgien oder anderen Nachbarländern wir freuen uns auf außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

WWW.ELECTRICVISIONSCLEVE.DE ODER KOMME OHNE ANMELDUNG SPONTAN VORBEI AUCH DAS IST MÖGLICH!'

🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬

Project: The Green Frog  

Director: Khushik Mangal

Production Company: Chronic Pictures

Location: London / Surrey  

Shoot Dates: End July, 2026  

We are casting for a key role in our upcoming feature film:

Character: Lando LeDoux  

Gender: Male  

Age Range: 21–28

Requirements:  

– Must have long hair  

– Must be able to grow a beard  

– Strong screen presence and naturalistic acting style preferred  

This is a great opportunity to be part of an experimental, character-driven indie feature. 

📩 To apply, please send:

– Headshot  

– Showreel (if available)  

– Current photos (showing hair length)  

– Contact details  

Email: chronicpictures22@gmail.com  

Website: chronicpictures.co.uk  

Tag someone perfect for this role 👇

#CastingCall #Actors #LondonActors #SurreyActors #IndieFilm #ActingOpportunity

items.text:
🎙️ VOICEOVER ARTIST NEEDED – Paid  | London | 9th June
Looking for a male voice actor, 50s–60s+, with an English accent for a paid studio recording session.

The project is an MFA Goldsmiths Fine Art visual/audio piece – an independent, non-commercial work. The dialogue is philosophical, poetic, and sometimes argumentative, exploring ideas about the present world, emotion, and the future – all set within a conversation between four characters inside a car.

📅 Date: Tuesday 9th June

⏱️ Duration: ~4 hours

📍 Location: E1 4NS, London (in-person studio)

💷 Rate: £80 + travel expenses reimbursed

looking for someone with a strong, characterful voice and the ability to take direction.

If you’re interested or know someone who might be, please drop me a email with your folio x 

yanyuetaozhi@gmail.com

Thank you! 🙏

topComments.text: £20 an hour for a voiceover artist? That’s a rip off.
Be careful people, they profile isn't encouraging

items.text:
🎭📸 ACTORS, MODELS & YORKSHIRE FOLK — WE NEED YOU!

Just two weeks ago, Yorkshire Chronicles didn’t exist.

Today, thousands of people are following our stories about Yorkshire’s hidden history, local legends, mysteries and haunted locations.

Now we’re looking for real Yorkshire faces to become part of future stories.

Whether you’re:
🎭 An actor
📸 A model
🎬 A creator
🏡 A local resident
👻 A paranormal enthusiast
🐶 Or even proud of your furry friend…

Post a headshot, a full-length photo and tell us where you’re from.

Your photos remain yours. We claim no ownership whatsoever. Any images used will only be with your permission and may be enhanced with AI to help bring Yorkshire’s stories to life.

We’ve also got exciting collaborations coming soon, including experienced mediums and a ghost-hunting team familiar to TV audiences.

👇 Post your photo below.

👀 Your story could be next.

🔄 Please share this with friends, actors, models and fellow Yorkshire folk.

#YorkshireChronicles #YorkshireHistory #YorkshireLife #ActorsUK #ModelsUK #WestYorkshire #YorkshireLegends #GhostStories

sharedPost.text:
🚨 YOUR FACE IN YORKSHIRE CHRONICLES? 🚨

Just two weeks ago, Yorkshire Chronicles didn’t exist.

Today, thanks to all of you, we’ve built an incredible community sharing Yorkshire’s history, mysteries, legends and forgotten stories.

Now I’d like some of you to become part of them.

📸 To put yourself forward, simply post:

✅ A headshot

✅ A full-length photo

✅ Your location

No experience needed.

Whether you’re a Yorkshire Chronicles follower, actor, model, creator, presenter, photographer, paranormal enthusiast—or simply proud to be from Yorkshire—I’d love to hear from you.

👻 Historical recreations

🏚️ Haunted locations

🕵️ Mystery investigations

📜 Forgotten Yorkshire stories

🐾 Pets welcome too!

🤖 Some images may be creatively enhanced using AI to help bring Yorkshire’s stories to life.

🔒 Your photographs remain yours. You keep full ownership at all times.

🎥 We also have experienced mediums and members of a well-known TV ghost-hunting team joining future projects.

👇 ONE QUESTION 👇

If Yorkshire Chronicles came to your town tomorrow…

What story should we investigate?

Tag a friend, share this post, and let’s build something special together.

📸🎬👻

SZUKAMY AKTORA DO TRUDNYCH SPRAW

SZUKAMY OSÓB Z DOŚWIADCZENIEM W INNYCH PRODUKCJACH Z PRAWEM JAZDY 

Wiktor Szymański (wiek kandydata 23-27 lat) – grafik komputerowy. Żonaty. Impulsywny, sympatyczny chłopak o przyjemnej aparycji. Ubiera się głównie w sportowym stylu. Aktor musi umieć prowadzić samochód.

Termin zdjęć: 11-13.06

Wszystko płatne gotówką na planie po zakończeniu zdjęć. Stawka do dogadania.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o komentarz pod postem lub wiadomość prywatną

Zgłoszenia można także wysyłać na e-mail: julia.lisowiec@polotmedia.pl

W temacie proszę wpisać Casting rola Wiktor

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
Where Will Your Acting Career Be a Year From Now If You Keep Doing What You’re Doing?
You trained. You got the headshots. Maybe you even got the agent.

And yet you’re wondering how you’re supposed to become a working actor when nobody explains the strategy behind it?

I am Freya Tingley. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It was not.

The actors who book have figured out the strategy. The ones who don’t are still hoping for their lucky break.

I’ve been getting a lot of messages from actors saying:

“I have an agent but I’m getting no auditions.”
“I’m auditioning but not booking.”
“I feel stuck, what do I do?”

All you need is the strategy. 

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you’re stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next - with the exact strategy to move you forward. 

If you know something needs to change, DM me “COMMIT” to apply for a session.

What would it cost you to change nothing?

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE 🎭

"There must be a place where my heart isn't a burden."

We are excited to announce casting for *A Place Not Mine*, an original fantasy musical about belonging, love, loss, and the things in life we cannot always avoid.

📍 Rehearsals: Middlesex University, London
🎭 Performances: The Drayton Arms Theatre
📅 29 & 30 November 2026

This is an independent, unpaid production. Should funding become available, any profits will be shared among the cast and creative team.

We are currently seeking performers aged 18–30 (35 for Sylas), as well as members of our creative team.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎭 AVAILABLE ROLES

✨ RIVEN
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Riven (Winx Club)
Intelligent, withdrawn and emotionally guarded.
Audition song:
🎵 Reflection – Mulan

✨ SERAPHINE
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Glinda (Wicked)
Bright, bubbly and seemingly perfect.
Audition song:
🎵 Once Upon a December – Anastasia

✨ ORIS
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Olaf (Frozen)
Loyal, optimistic and unintentionally funny.
Audition song:
🎵 This Wish – Wish

✨ SYLAS
Playing age: 25–35
Character reference: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)
Strict, intelligent and intimidating.
Audition song:
🎵 This Is The Thanks I Get?! – Wish

✨ ROWAN
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Kristoff (Frozen)
A sarcastic drama king who uses humour to survive awkward situations.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ ELARA
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Jade West (Victorious)
Sharp, intelligent and never afraid to speak her mind.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ AURORA
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)
Kind-hearted, supportive and emotionally open.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ SELENE
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Barbie (Barbie 2023)
Sweet, energetic and slightly chaotic.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎬 CREATIVE TEAM OPPORTUNITIES

We are also looking for:

✨ DIRECTOR
✨ CHOREOGRAPHER
✨ MUSICAL DIRECTOR

These positions are ideal for university students looking to expand their portfolio, gain practical experience, or complete placement requirements.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

Send us a DM on our instagram page at:

@a.place.not.mine

Actors should submit a self-tape performing the requested audition song.

Successful applicants will receive an invitation to an in-person audition.

We look forward to hearing from you.

💙 Find a place that's yours.

sharedPost.text:
Why We Wrote the Soundtrack for The Miner's Son
One question we're often asked is why we wrote and recorded an original soundtrack for The Miner's Son rather than using well-known songs from the era.
Part of the answer was practical. As an independent film, we simply couldn't afford the licensing costs of famous songs for use throughout the film.
But there was another reason.
At the heart of The Miner's Son is a young band chasing their dreams. Rather than having them perform cover versions of existing songs, we wanted them to have their own identity, their own sound and their own music.
I've been a songwriter for many years, and my husband Kevin has played guitar for most of his life. So we decided to write the songs ourselves.
What began as a necessity soon became one of the most rewarding parts of making the film. The music wasn't just added to the story it became part of it.
The songs were written to reflect the hopes, struggles and ambitions of the characters, helping to bring the world of The Miner's Son to life.
Looking back, we're grateful things turned out that way. The film gained its own unique musical identity, and the soundtrack has gone on to find an audience of its own.
Thank you to everyone who has supported both the film and the music. It means more than you know.

🎬 The Miner's Son
🎸 Original soundtrack by Kevin and Juliette Short
#TheMinersSon #IndependentFilm #FilmSoundtrack #OriginalMusic #BritishFilm #IndieFilm #RockMusic #Songwriting  #SupportIndependentFilm
#myspotlightindependent

items.text:
Most actors will read this and do nothing. That is fine. This is not for them.
I am Freya Tingley. Two Netflix series regular roles. Six feature film leads. Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood.
Once Upon a Time on ABC.

Started at 14. No connections. No money. No Hollywood family. Signed with a top Hollywood agent by 17. Booked a Netflix series regular at 18, three months after moving to LA.

That is not luck. That is a strategy I can prove works, because I have run it on myself and watched it work on the
actors I have quietly coached for years.
Here is what most actors are doing.

Training, thousands of dollars.
New headshots, hundreds.
Self-tapes, no bookings.
Waiting for agents to call.

Years burned. Bank accounts drained. Confidence destroyed.

Here is what working actors are actually doing.

Optimising for the one specific skill that determines booking rate.
Engineering the conditions for representation to chase them.
Generating their own opportunities when reps go quiet.
Treating their career like a business, not a lottery ticket.

That is the difference. And nobody teaches it.

So I am running 2-hour private 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. Just you and me. Fully tailored to your career stage.

What you get:
• A diagnosis of why you are stuck, specific not generic
• The booking skill audit, will rewire how you audition
• A representation strategy if you do not have an agent
• A re-activation strategy if your agent has gone cold• A self-generated opportunity plan you can run this month
• My exact materials checklist

Outcome: you leave with a written plan. No confusion. No "what now". Just execution.

If you know you are ready, DM me "COMMIT" to apply.

I take a handful of these a month. That is it.

items.text:
**NOW CASTING UK CONTENT CREATORS** 📣

Paid commercial campaign for Sensodyne.

We’re looking for warm, engaging people who create content online, feel confident on camera, and genuinely experience sensitive teeth.

This is a social-first style campaign focused on real people and authentic conversation, so we’re much more interested in personality, relatability and ease on camera than polished influencer-style content or huge followings.

Lifestyle, wellness, food, parenting, reviews, everyday life, humour etc all welcome.

**Important note:**
This is NOT an influencer deliverables campaign and no posting to your own social channels is required.

**Shoot details:**
• London
• 2nd and/or 3rd July
• Likely 1–2 shoot days

**Fees:**
• £350 per shoot day
• £8,000 usage fee if featured in the final campaign

**If interested, please email:**
casting@casperblackcasting.com

**Please include:**
• Name
• Age
• Location
• Social handles
• Contact number
• A little note about your experience with sensitive teeth

Thank you!

Casper x

Please feel free to tag/share with anybody who may be a great fit ✨

Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung. 

Drehzeitraum: 13.07. - 21.08.2026

Alter: 18 bis 55 Jahre

Geschlecht: w/m/d

Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung

Gage: unbezahlt

Wichtig: Du musst nicht in dem gesamten Drehzeitraum verfügbar sein. Wir planen dich nach deiner Verfügbarkeit ein.

LOGLINE: Zwischen einem dominanten Trainer, der ihn zu formen versucht, und einer jungen Frau, die ihm eine andere Welt zeigt, steht ein junger Tischtennisspieler vor der Entscheidung: weiter funktionieren - oder endlich fühlen.

Meld dich gerne mit deinen Sperrterminen und einem Portrait bei untererfolg@gmail.com mit dem Betreff „Komparsen“.

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.text:
Where Will Your Acting Career Be a Year From Now If You Keep Doing What You’re Doing?
You trained. You got the headshots. Maybe you even got the agent.

And yet you’re wondering how you’re supposed to become a working actor when things aren’t progressing?

I am Freya Tingley. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It wasn’t.

What you are not being told is that the actors who book have figured out the strategy. The ones who do not are still hoping for their lucky break.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying:
“I have an agent but no auditions.”
“I am auditioning but not booking.”
“I do not know what I am doing wrong.”

All you need is the strategy. 

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you’re stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next - with the exact strategy to move you forward. 

If you know something needs to change, direct message me “COMMIT” to apply for a session. I have just a handful 

What would it cost you to change nothing?

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Chloe, and I’m actively looking for opportunities to work as a Film Production Assistant in film, television, commercials, or other media productions.

I’m a 2024 high school graduate with a strong passion for storytelling, filmmaking, and television production. I have experience with video editing, creative writing, screenwriting, theater arts, and working in fast-paced team environments. I’m reliable, hardworking, organized, and eager to learn from industry professionals.

✅ Valid driver’s license
✅ Willing to relocate anywhere for the right opportunity
✅ Flexible schedule
✅ Strong work ethic and positive attitude
✅ Passionate about film and television production

I’m looking to connect with filmmakers, production companies, crew members, and anyone who may know of PA openings, internships, or entry-level opportunities.

If you have any advice, leads, or opportunities, please feel free to comment or send me a message. Thank you for your time and support!

I DO LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA BUT I AM WILLING TO MOVE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! 

#FilmProductionAssistant #ProductionAssistant #FilmJobs #TVProduction #Filmmaking #FilmIndustry #ProductionCrew #EntryLevelFilmJobs #OpenToWork #FilmNetworking #AspiringFilmmaker 🎥✨

items.summary:
CASTING CALL — CASTRATO

Seeking London-based actors for a psychological horror proof of concept set within a 1970s boys’ choir conservatoire.

“The beauty of a choirboy’s voice lies in its transience.”

We are currently casting the roles of:

• Peter (Male, 8–11)

• Albert (Male, 10–14)

• Michel-Cesar (Male, 40–60)

• Nurse Valentina (Female, 35–60)

Shooting in London • 1 day shoot • 13–14 June

Please see poster for full details.

To apply:

castratofilm@gmail.com

#CastingCall #ActorCall #LondonActors #ShortFilm #PsychologicalHorror #IndieFilm #Casting #FilmCasting #HorrorFilm #UKActors
items.title: CASTING CALL — CASTRATO

items.text:
**ACCENT SEARCH! Regional LEEDS YORKSHIRE accent needed for actors accent breakdown! Native accents only please!**

Is this you? Are you willing to offer around 2 hours of time to help drama students create a northern accent breakdown for their next project? If so please get in touch asap!

This is an unpaid job but will be a chance to build your network with students from the Oxford School of Drama and an opportunity to skill share.

What will be required of you: voice recordings from provided scripts, 10 min interview, collaborative openness.

Thank you for your time 😊

topComments.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.
You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette
Science Boffins

items.text:
Narrow Path Presents 
Creative Director and Photographer 
Casey Miners 

CASTING CALL: RUSTED (Concept Test Shoot)

"Time doesn’t heal. It fractures."
Are you ready to step into a world of high-stakes dark fantasy and temporal chaos?
I am currently casting for a series of high-quality test shots to build the visual identity of my upcoming project, Rusted. 

I am looking for actors with intense screen presence, a strong look, and the willingness to help me bring this dark, visceral world to life.
Whether you are a seasoned professional looking to update your portfolio or a new face wanting to gain set experience, I want to hear from you.

THE DETAILS
Location: Toowoomba, QLD.

Commitment: One-day test shoot 

Compensation: This is an unpaid test shoot. You will receive high-resolution professional photos from the shoot and a cinematic video showreel featuring your performance for use in your professional portfolio.

THE ROLES
Rowan (The Explorer): Early 30s. A rugged, weathered time travelling treasure hunter. Lean and athletic. He possesses a sardonic wit but is driven by a reluctant heroism. He is a man who has crawled through centuries of rubble. Looking for someone with a background in movement, parkour, or martial arts.

Ilyra (The Assassin): 18-40. Agile, silent, lethal, and mysterious. She possesses a disciplined, deadly calm. Looking for someone with a background in movement, parkour, or martial arts.

Kanen (The Paradox incursion): Male, 20s–40s. A character who exists outside of normal time. He moves with a predatory, calculated grace. Looking for a haunting, intense gaze and the ability to portray a character who feels "unmoored" from reality. Experience in physical theater is a major plus.

The Immortal/Cultist: Commanding, eerie, and powerful. Must be able to embody the weight of centuries.

WHY JOIN ME?
This is a chance to collaborate on a unique project with a distinct visual aesthetic. You won’t just be a face in front of a camera; you’ll be helping me define the look of a franchise. 

Extra contribution
I am looking for collaborative, creative individuals who are excited to experiment with movement, character, and tone.

HOW TO APPLY
Please send your application to caseyminers@yahoo.com.au
0432282150
 with the following:
1. Full Name & Age.
2. A brief bio or resume (if you have one).
3. Recent headshots/full-body photos.
4. A 30-second self-tape (optional): Tell us, in character, what you would do if you found a weapon that could change history. 

Show us your intensity!
Applications are now open
Step into the fracture. Help me define the Rusted universe.

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE 🎭

"There must be a place where my heart isn't a burden."

We are excited to announce casting for *A Place Not Mine*, an original fantasy musical about belonging, love, loss, and the things in life we cannot always avoid.

📍 Rehearsals: Middlesex University, London
🎭 Performances: The Drayton Arms Theatre
📅 29 & 30 November 2026

This is an independent, unpaid production. Should funding become available, any profits will be shared among the cast and creative team.

We are currently seeking performers aged 18–30 (35 for Sylas), as well as members of our creative team.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎭 AVAILABLE ROLES

✨ RIVEN
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Riven (Winx Club)
Intelligent, withdrawn and emotionally guarded.
Audition song:
🎵 Reflection – Mulan

✨ SERAPHINE
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Glinda (Wicked)
Bright, bubbly and seemingly perfect.
Audition song:
🎵 Once Upon a December – Anastasia

✨ ORIS
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Olaf (Frozen)
Loyal, optimistic and unintentionally funny.
Audition song:
🎵 This Wish – Wish

✨ SYLAS
Playing age: 25–35
Character reference: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)
Strict, intelligent and intimidating.
Audition song:
🎵 This Is The Thanks I Get?! – Wish

✨ ROWAN
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Kristoff (Frozen)
A sarcastic drama king who uses humour to survive awkward situations.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ ELARA
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Jade West (Victorious)
Sharp, intelligent and never afraid to speak her mind.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ AURORA
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)
Kind-hearted, supportive and emotionally open.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

✨ SELENE
Playing age: 18–25
Character reference: Barbie (Barbie 2023)
Sweet, energetic and slightly chaotic.
Audition song:
🎵 Any Disney song

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎬 CREATIVE TEAM OPPORTUNITIES

We are also looking for:

✨ DIRECTOR
✨ CHOREOGRAPHER
✨ MUSICAL DIRECTOR

These positions are ideal for university students looking to expand their portfolio, gain practical experience, or complete placement requirements.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

Send us a DM on our instagram page at:

@a.place.not.mine

Actors should submit a self-tape performing the requested audition song.

Successful applicants will receive an invitation to an in-person audition.

We look forward to hearing from you.

💙 Find a place that's yours.

PERFORMANCES 29&30 NOVEMBER 2026 THE DRAY THEDRAYTON TON ARMSTHEATRE THEATRE ARMS CASTING CALL AGED AGED18-3 18- 30 NOFORMALTRAINING NOFORMAL TRAINING REQUIRED IRED SUBMITASELF-TAPE UBMIT ASELF-TAPE (REQUESTED ESTED SONG) (REQU DM DMUSTOAPPLY APPLY @A.PLACE.NOT.MINE @A.PLACE EACH UCCESSFUI APPLICANT WILL RECEIVE MESSAGE WITH AN INVITATION TO AN -PERSON AUDITION. +FINDAPLACET HAT''

BBR Indie Films is seeking dynamic, authentic female talent for an upcoming professional music video shoot. We are looking for women who can powerfully embody the following roles:
 
Skilled Trades & Labor:
Mechanics, Construction Workers, Welders, etc

Civil & Community Heroes: Firefighters, Judge, Police or Detective, Mail Carriers / Couriers

Athletes & Performers:

 Sports Players (Track & Field, Softball, Basketball, etc.)

📋 COMPENSATION
 IMDb Credit Provided
 Meals Provided on Set

If you fit any of the descriptions above, please submit your application to:

Submission Requirements:
Please respond with a recent photograph, preferably showcasing you in your uniform, work gear, or athletic attire. SUBJECT:  Female Talent

Join us on set and help bring this vision to life!

items.text:
CASTING CALL
A non-union Black sapphic narrative short film about loss, love, and the rich cultural spiritual traditions that process it all.

Shoots in Detroit, late summer 2026, tentative Spring 2027

LEAD — CANEISHA, mid-40s to 50s, Black masc-presenting/stud/androgynous. Grief-stricken, but warm and entertaining before losing the love of her life.

LEAD — LOVIE, late 40s to 50s, Black, dark-skinned or medium-brown, femme-presenting, free-spirited and goofy, with a classic case of eldest sister syndrome that still resides in her. 

SUPPORTING — AFENI, mid-40s to 50s, Black, medium-brown or dark-skinned, masc-presenting, tender best friend, kind of a hippie. 

SUPPORTING — AZRAELIA, mid-30s to mid-40s, dark-skinned Black woman, witty younger sister, ambitious and trendy businesswoman. Ideally full-figured.

SUPPORTING — PAPA MONTGOMERY - late 70s to 90s, Black, if y'all don't get y'all grandfather involved in a film. Playful and lively. 

COMPENSATION: This is a microbudget project. Currently we can guarantee profit shares from the film, but we are working on honorariums for each principal role. We're also working on funding to hopefully assist with travel or lodging for non-locals.

HOW TO APPLY:

Submit a good quality photo, resume, age, a reel if you have one and interest to freedomdrumfilm@gmail.com and casting director MacKenzie Galloway at mackenziegallowayllc@gmail.com. Sides will be sent upon receipt. Supplemental dramatic and comedic monologues are welcome. 

Stay involved with the project @freedomdrumfilm.

View the casting call on Instagram and Backstage: 

https://www.instagram.com/p/DX6qXEEDmME/?igsh=Z2g4aWNkMmF3dDE3

https://www.backstage.com/casting/freedom-drum-3147338/

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
**JOB:** Web Series — Recurring Host Role 

**CASTING:** Open gender, 25-45, strong on camera presence **LOCATION:** Long Beach, California, USA 

**COMPENSATION:** Paid — $1,000 per shoot day, rate open to discussion as series develops 

**CONTACT:** chloe@muhameds.com 

**TIME(S):** Accepting submissions now, production ongoing

Non-union. Seeking a host for a short form branded web series for a wellness and performance drink company shooting at a professional sound stage in Long Beach.

The character is knowledgeable, worldly, and genuinely curious — someone who's done the research and can't stop talking about what they found. Think less polished spokesperson, more fascinating person you met at a dinner party who happens to know everything about the history of medicinal mushrooms and isn't weird about it. Each episode covers a single functional ingredient — its origins, the science, why it matters. Scripts are provided but the right person will make them feel completely natural and uncontrived.

Background or genuine personal interest in health, wellness, nutrition, herbalism, biohacking, or related fields is a real advantage — the content will reward someone who actually finds this stuff interesting.

You are not: a supplement bro or a wellness influencer.

To apply send a short self tape video introducing yourself and why this sounds like your kind of thing. No formal reel required — just show us who you are.

**AUDITION ALERT!!**

Universal Studios Japan and Universal Studios Beijing are looking for exceptional talent to join their international casts in early 2027.

Seeking:

⭐Singers, Rappers, Choristers

⭐Dancers, Tappers, Ballerinas, Breakdancers, Gymnasts

⭐Actors

items.text:
🎬 **Casting Call Alert!**

We’re looking for talented performers for **MAMA**, a fantasy drama student short film exploring grief, healing, and the connection between the physical and spiritual worlds.

🎞 **Production Name:** *MAMA*
📍 **Location:** Berlin
🎓 **Produced as part of the Master’s program at MetFilm School Berlin**
🎥 **Shooting Dates:** July 14–20 (3 shooting days + rehearsals)
💰 **Low-budget student production**

🎭 **Roles:**
* INTIMBA - Female, 40s–50s
* TSIKO - Female, 20s–30s
* JINYA - Male, 30s–40s

🌍 This project is inspired by East African folklore, African masks, and the cultural traditions that shape the film’s spiritual world.

We particularly encourage submissions from performers of African heritage. East African heritage is a strong plus, though not required. Movement and/or dance experience is also a plus.

📩 **If you're interested, please send your headshot, CV, and/or demo reel to:**
**abril.arap.film@gmail.com**

Help us bring this visually rich and emotionally resonant story to life.

We can’t wait to see your submissions! 🌙✨

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen, Komparsen, die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,

items.summary:
⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,
• lekarze,
• inwestor Mr. Jones.

Wszystkie role posiadają kwestie dialogowe w języku angielskim.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem w projekcie, wyślij proszę wiadomość prywatną wraz ze swoim zgłoszeniem.

Czekam na Wasze wiadomości!

Irina
Casting Director

items.text:
Mondays 6.30-7.30pm
Thursdays 7-8pm (First Class Free!)

Please DM me to book or with any questions. 🥰🙌

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

​Are you looking to leave your audience absolutely breathless? Look no further!

​LIGHT OF AFRICA ACROBATIC AND CIRCUS GROUP is officially available for bookings and international contracts! We bring a high-energy, culturally rich, and jaw-dropping performance that guarantees standing ovations.

​We specialize in a massive variety of world-class circus disciplines, including:

​High-Flying Acrobatics: Human Pyramids, Rolabola Pyramids, and dynamic Tumbling.

🎭✨ JOB OPPORTUNITY IN CHINA 🇨🇳 ✨🎭
We are currently looking for performers to work in nightclubs in China.

📍 Locations:
• Urumqi, Xinjiang
• Dalian City

🔎 Available Positions:
• 1 Male Singer/Dancer
• 1 Female Pole Dancer
• 2 Female Dancers
• 1 Male Dancer

✅ Requirements:
• Female height: minimum 165 cm
• Male height: minimum 178 cm
• Strong stage presence
• Proficiency in Latin dance styles
• Professional attitude and performance experience preferred

📋 Benefits:
• 6-month contract
• Work visa provided
• One Air ticket provided 
• Accommodation provided
• Meals provided

🕙 Working Hours:
10:00 PM – 2:00 AM

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
Applications will only be considered from candidates currently located in China, nearby Asian countries, or Europe.

Please do not apply if you do not meet the requirements listed above.

📩 Interested candidates should send their performance materials, recent photos, and current location via private message

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen, Komparsen, die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

 

3.      **Aaron**: **Male, 25-35. Any ethnicity.**

The department brown-noser. Aaron is always trying to impress management, climb the corporate ladder, and make himself look more important than he is. He has a long-running beef with Kenneth and enjoys trying to get under his skin.

**Tone:** Corporate suck-up, petty rival, passive-aggressive, self-important.

 

4.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

 

5.      **Depression**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s depression. Depression is strangely upbeat and excited while delivering negative thoughts, self-doubt, and emotional pressure. This character should feel charming, unsettling, and emotionally dangerous without becoming cartoonish.

**Tone:** Cheerful menace, darkly funny, manipulative, emotionally sharp.

 

6.      **Anxiety**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s anxiety. Anxiety is panicky, restless, and constantly processing too many thoughts at once. They bounce between positive and negative possibilities while trying to calm both Kenneth and themselves down.

**Tone:** Erratic, nervous, fast-thinking, emotionally overwhelmed, sympathetic.

 

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks.  

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

items.text:
TITLE: LAST DEBT

GENRE:
Drama / Thriller

LOGLINE:
A dangerous confrontation between two women reveals betrayal, deception, and a deadly secret that neither can escape.

ROLE:
GABY

• Female
• Age 25–40
• Hard of Hearing preferred
• Fluent in American Sign Language (ASL)
• Must be able to communicate in both ASL and spoken English
• Distinctive appearance preferred
• Strong dramatic acting ability required

Character Description:
Gaby is a complex and emotionally layered woman who appears vulnerable and trustworthy but is deeply involved in a dangerous world of deception, manipulation, and survival. The role requires emotional depth, expressive facial acting, and the ability to perform intense dramatic scenes.

PRODUCTION COMPANY:
Quiet Mile Pictures

Writer:
Martina Bell

Director:
Nicki Runge

Producer:
Martina Bell and Nicki Runge

PRODUCTION TYPE:
Independent Short Film (Non-Union)

RUN TIME:
Short Film (Approximately 5–10 minutes)

COMPENSATION:
Paid

UNION STATUS:
Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION:
Initial submission requires:
• Headshot
• Resume
• Demo Reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted to submit a self-taped audition.

Submission Deadline:
June 20, 2026

SHOOTING SCHEDULE:
Principal Photography:
July 16–17, 2026

Two-day shoot schedule.

Rehearsal dates to be scheduled with selected cast.

FILMING LOCATION:
Denver, Colorado

CONTACT INFORMATION:
Email: [audition@qmpictures.com](mailto:audition@qmpictures.com)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
Quiet Mile Pictures is seeking an actress for the role of Gaby in the upcoming short film Last Debt. We welcome submissions from Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and hearing performers who meet the role requirements. This is a character-driven dramatic thriller with strong emotional performances and limited locations, making it an excellent opportunity for actors seeking substantial screen time in a lead supporting role.
