• Fluent in American Sign Language (ASL)
• Must be able to communicate in both ASL and spoken English
• Distinctive appearance preferred
• Strong dramatic acting ability required

Character Description:
Gaby is a complex and emotionally layered woman who appears vulnerable and trustworthy but is deeply involved in a dangerous world of deception, manipulation, and survival. The role requires emotional depth, expressive facial acting, and the ability to perform intense dramatic scenes.

PRODUCTION COMPANY:
Quiet Mile Pictures

Writer:
Martina Bell

Director:
Nicki Runge

Producer:
Martina Bell and Nicki Runge

PRODUCTION TYPE:
Independent Short Film (Non-Union)

RUN TIME:
Short Film (Approximately 5–10 minutes)

COMPENSATION:
Paid

UNION STATUS:
Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION:
Initial submission requires:
• Headshot
• Resume
• Demo Reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted to submit a self-taped audition.

Submission Deadline:
June 20, 2026

SHOOTING SCHEDULE:
Principal Photography:
July 16–17, 2026

Two-day shoot schedule.

Rehearsal dates to be scheduled with selected cast.

FILMING LOCATION:
Denver, Colorado

CONTACT INFORMATION:
Email: [audition@qmpictures.com](mailto:audition@qmpictures.com)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
Quiet Mile Pictures is seeking an actress for the role of Gaby in the upcoming short film Last Debt. We welcome submissions from Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and hearing performers who meet the role requirements. This is a character-driven dramatic thriller with strong emotional performances and limited locations, making it an excellent opportunity for actors seeking substantial screen time in a lead supporting role.

San Fernando Valley Parking Lot Available for Filming / Basecamp

Looking to see if there’s any interest from production crews, location managers, or event organizers.

We have a large private parking lot available at 5650 Shoup Ave, Woodland Hills, CA 91367 in the west San Fernando Valley. The lot can accommodate 100+ vehicles and works well for:

* Film & TV basecamp
* Crew parking
* Production staging
* Equipment storage
* Commercial shoots
* Special events

Easy access, plenty of space, and flexible availability depending on the date.

For details, availability, or rates, text Sam at 818-300-3023.

🎬 CASTING - AKTORKA DO ZNANEGO SERIALU 🎬
To może być rola właśnie dla Ciebie!

Poszukujemy aktorki po państwowej szkole do udziału w znanym serialu telewizyjnym.

📍 Lokalizacja zdjęć: Wrocław
📅 Dni zdjęciowe: 6, 7 i 8 lipca
🎬Wiek: 37-43 lata
💰 Stawka: 3000 zł brutto za 3 dni zdjęciowe

Jeśli masz doświadczenie, charyzmę i chcesz dołączyć do profesjonalnej produkcji - czekamy właśnie na Ciebie! ✨

📧 Zgłoszenia wysyłaj na: aktorzy@unagimedia.pl
W treści maila podaj:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• wzrost
• numer telefonu
Dołącz:
• zdjęcie portretowe
• zdjęcie sylwetki
• wideowizytówkę
• link do FilmuPolskiego

Nie zwlekaj – być może to właśnie Ty dołączysz do obsady naszego projektu! 🎭
Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie! 💫

items.text:
BUILDING STAY LIVE

Design the Film • Play Along • Win Prizes

Ever wondered what it takes to turn a novel into a film?

Join us for a fun, interactive evening as we pull back the curtain on the STAY proof of concept and invite you into the filmmaking process.

Throughout the event, you'll help us make creative decisions, play along in live games, compete for prizes, and get an inside look at how we're bringing STAY from page to screen.

During the event we'll:

 Explore characters, locations, and visual ideas from the STAY universe

 Help design the world of STAY through live audience polls and discussions

 Learn what goes into creating a proof of concept and why we're making one

 Play "Guess the Budget" and see if you can correctly estimate real filmmaking costs

 Compete in fun character-based games and cast challenges

 Win STAY-themed prizes and exclusive digital goodies

 Learn how your support helps bring this story to life

Whether you've read the books, attended previous events, or are discovering STAY for the very first time, this event is designed to be interactive, entertaining, and welcoming to everyone.

Come play along, meet the team, and help us build the future of STAY.

 Date & Time:

June 8, 2026 @ 3pm PST, 4pm MST, 5pm CST, 6pm EST

 Platform:

Riverside

[https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl](https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExS0d0OE5nZnF5TWVnbmhtQ3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR44MxgWb1RLT3_qROaFO1BN_IdZFHqvF_4MH7cEmbEPLXvGoNQdRb5wzT8BFA_aem_vzQT1Q-jEiMSrBOcmfWERw)...

 Prizes Available Throughout the Event

 Supporting the STAY Proof of Concept

items.title: BUILDING STAY LIVE

items.text:
**We are still seeking actors ages 18 and up! Auditions are due Tuesday!**

**Project: **Cryptophasia

**Type: **Theatre

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.
items.previewDescription: Stagebugz Theatre is a 501(c)3 youth theater company dedicated to providing accessible theatre education where every performer is valued and uplifted. We offer affordable acting and musical theatre classes, productions, and summer camps, free workshops, and family-friendly performances!

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

*Gaylord Rockies Resort & Convention Center*
* June 26: 11:30am-6pm
* June 27: 9am-5:30pm
* June 28: 8:30am-2pm

**Rate: **$225/day with up to $30/day reimbursed for parking or rideshare

**Dress Code:** gym attire

**To Apply:** Please email a recent picture to Staffing@EliteEventPros.com

Make sure include ASE in the subject.

Thank you!

items.text:
We are so excited to present an amazing group of 30 models walking in not one, but two runways tomorrow at Orlando International Fashion Week 2026! @orlandofashionweek_int @starrdalton 

They will be showcasing designs from @mylittlematilda and @matildacouturedresses where we have been offering age-appropriate formal wear for all ages since 2010.

Our collections are designed as elegant formal wear you can wear to any special occasion. These are not costumes or themed outfits—they are true formal fashion pieces for every age, created to celebrate style, confidence, and timeless elegance. #mylittlematilda #oifw #orlando #florida

items.text:
Hi all

My name is Kian O’Keeffe , I am an actor based in sw London looking for opportunities and a way to show my art to the world , I am driven by passion and love for this industry and true appreciation for this art that we explore , looking for paid roles and opportunities to proceed with , if you are interested please reach out.

And here’s my show reel for you to
Gain access to what I have to offer , hope to hear from you all , 

https://www.spotlight.com/9496-3496-1567

Yours sincerely 
Kian O’Keeffe

items.text:
Tancerki potrzebne do obłędnej ekipy Tancerze PL - najbliższe zlecenia 6, 13 czerwca 2026. Narazie szukamy osób dostępnych w czerwcu które już z nami tańczyły (!!!) - w tym wypadku dzwońcie do Sylwii: 602406111 . 

Inne Tancerki i Tancerze, którzy chcieliby dołączyć do grupy na stałe - wkrótce ogłosimy casting. Jeśli chcesz się zgłosić już teraz - zaobserwuj naszego instagrama i skomentuj ten post. Następnie wyślij zgłoszenie przez grupa@tamcerze.pl . 

Zlecenia są choreograficzne (Tancerki klubowe, gogo dancers, fordanserki - nie dadzą rady) - próby (na tę chwilę) wyłącznie w Warszawie. Opcjonalnie osoby z 3miasta i okolic.

Uwaga, wyłącznie osoby wszechstronne tanecznie z dobrymi podstawami tańca jazzowego lub klasycznego lub towarzyskiego. Tylko osoby z klasą, i eleganckim, naturalnym wyglądem (przesadnie usta, botox itp - to nie nasza estetyka) 

PS. Jeśli tańczysz tylko high heels, sambę, bachate… dowolną wąską specjalizację - a nie masz podstaw klasycznych - możesz spróbować, ale będzie ciężko dorównać do poziomu grupy. Zaobserwuj nas i poczekaj na casting

items.text:
COMMERCIAL CASTING CALL- Looking for Male Youth Swimmers, or swim team! Ages 8-15 years old.

My name is Taylor Long, and I'm a Casting Associate with Sean Milliken Casting.

We're currently casting an upcoming insurance commercial and are looking for male youth swimmers, approximately 8–15 years old. We're hoping to cast a full swim team, with opportunities for both featured extras and background roles.

I have a document with more information about the project, including filming dates and details on how parents or guardians can get in touch if they're interested in learning more. Please reach out!

We'd greatly appreciate it if you could share this opportunity with any swimmers or families who may be interested. It could be a fun and exciting experience for young athletes!

Thank you so much for your time and support. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out, I’d be happy to help!

The financial rates are, if booked as an extra- $300.00 per person or, if upgraded to a featured extra, $2,500 per person.

Warm regards,

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'SEAN MILLIKEN CASTING COMMERCIAL CASTING CALL WE ARE LOOKING FOR: MALE YOUTH SWIM TEAMS- AGED 8-15 YEARS FOR AN INSURANCE COMMERCIAL MUST BE REAL SWIMMERS MUST BE AVAILABLE JUNE 16th-21st FEATURED EXTRA OR EXTRA RATE IF THIS IS YOU, OR ANYONE YOU KNOW, PLEASE EMAIL SMC.ASST@GMAIL.COM'

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED FOR INDIE FEATURE FILM** 🎬

We're looking for **2 volunteer background actors** for a scene in an independent feature film shooting at **Stanley Park**.

**Roles Needed:**
• 1 Female (Age 30–60)
• 1 Male (Age 30–60)
• Ethnicity: Caucasian 

📍 **Location:** Stanley Park, Vancouver
📅 **Date:** June 6, Saturday.
🕒 **Call Time:** 3:00 PM, the shoot will be done in 2hrs.

*Please note that the shooting time may change slightly on the day. We will keep selected participants updated, so please be available and keep your phone nearby.*

**Scene Description:**
Our lead characters are trying to take a selfie together when two friendly passersby offer to help by taking the photo. It's a simple, fun interaction with a small amount of on-camera presence.

• **Volunteer** position
• **Film credit** provided
• **Craft services** (snacks and refreshments) provided

If you're interested, please send us a message with your head shot, showreel, name and age at **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**. Feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit!

**Submission deadline 6th June 2026, 12pm.**

Thank you for supporting independent filmmaking! 🎥

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - REAL WELDERS (30-50) - NON-UNION COMMERCIAL **

**Seeking REAL WELDERS (AGES 30-50) for a NON-UNION commercial shooting in Vancouver, BC!**

NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED!

**To submit for this, please apply via the form below!**

**projectplantrealwelders.castingcrane.com**

**SUBMISSION DEADLINE:** MONDAY JUNE 8, 2026 (12 PM)

!!!  UWAGA  !!!  PILNE !!!  WARSZAWA   !!!   GLINIARZE  !!!

Do czerwcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

1. Gangster 2 (20-25) – masywny. Rola z tekstem.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
Pakiet kont w promocji za 150zł.
Wał na blika?

Natalia Szydłowska to piękne, młode dziewczę, które ewidentnie nie umie handlować. Ewentualnie może zależy jej na czasie, bo konta na Netflix Premium i HBO Max łącznie chce sprzedać za 150zł. To dość super okazja, bo te kosztują na ten czas 1399zł.

Wystarczy się jednak zastanowić nad czymś mocno istotnym, bo chodzi o samo konto osoby, która jako Natalia się przedstawia. Jako pierwsza w oczy rzuca się ilość znajomych. Tą jest 23 osoby, z których 5 to konta porno (osoby podające się za lasie, a będące fejkami reklamującymi jakieś strony), a reszta to same chłopy.

Drugą rzeczą jest data założenia konta, którą jest maj tego roku.

Ostatnim argumentem są zdjęcia Natalki. Tymi nie są jakieś kradzione foty z innych kont, a fotki wygenerowane przez AI. Widać to na załączonych zrzutach.

Pozostaje zatem zadać sobie pytanie, a mianowicie, to ile osób przy takich argumentach da się oszukać, lub ile już dało?

OPEN CALL
Арт-резиденция EDEN приглашает творческих, креативных личностей на ART‑FEST EDEN по волонтерским программам.

ВКЛЮЧЕНО: проживание, питание, работа в Эден, участие и создание мероприятий и ART‑FEST, материалы творцам, обучение для подмастерьев.

▪РЕЗИДЕНТ - ТВОРЕЦ:
1-5 дней, создавать, творить и помогать в Эден. О программе 👉🏻 https://art-grigor.ucoz.com/index/rezidence_art_garden_eden/0-25

▪РЕЗИДЕНТ - ПОДМАСТЕРЬЕ:
7-14 дней, обучаться и помогать в Эден. О программе 👉🏻 https://art-grigor.ucoz.com/index/rezidence_art_garden_eden/0-25

Даты по волонтерским программам:
▪Июнь 9 - 22
▪Июль 1 - 12
▪Август 17 - 30
▪Сентябрь 8 - 21
▪Октябрь 24 сент - 6 окт

Об #ART_FEST_EDEN
для художников, творческих людей из сферы искусства, кто находится в поисках нового яркого опыта, знаний, единомышленников.
🌹 Вардавар - Горящая роза, 10-12 июля

Куратор - художник Владимир Григорян.

НА ФЕСТИВАЛЕ ИСКУССТВ
•Отдых на природе,
•Пленэры, обучение, мастер‑классы, творчество и презентации, выставка, концерт.
• Кинопоказы, музыка, танцы и песни у костра;
• Пир с шашлыками;
• Спорт и развлечения.

🎯 ЦЕЛЬ: Создавать, созерцать и вдохновляться искусством и природой. Творчество, обмен опытом, общение и отдых на природе!

ТВОРЧЕСКИЕ НАПРАВЛЕНИЯ: живопись, графика, скульптура, ДПИ, фото, видео‑арт, дизайн, музыка, поэзия, театр, танцы...

ТВОРЧЕСКАЯ ТЕМА:
🔥Огонь и 🌊 Вода
Приглашаем поразмыслить, творить на тему контрастов и баланса противоположностей стихий и чувств, Огня (отдых, игры, любовь) и Воды (творчество, разум, сосредоточенность).
Встретим вместе яркий летний праздник Вардавар (Горящей розы - Преображение Господня) - это сочетание древних традиций и современного веселья, символ обновления жизни и любви! Главная традиция - обливание водой 😉

📝 ФОРМА ЗАЯВКИ - https://art-grigor.ucoz.com/index/rezidence_art_garden_eden/0-25#бронировать

По всем вопросам пишите в комментарии или в личные сообщения.

**🌴 CASTING NOW: DATING NAKED UK, SERIES 3 🌴**

Calling all **body-confident, extrovert singles aged 20+** who are ready for a once-in-a-lifetime dating adventure abroad.

MTV and Paramount+ are looking for fun, confident singles to travel to a gorgeous tropical location, meet other singles, look for love and potentially win a cash prize as part of **Dating Naked UK, Series 3**.

The cast will be living together, going on dates and taking part in activities while fully naked for the majority of the show, with nudity unblurred for broadcast, so applicants must be genuinely comfortable with this.

Filming is planned for **late summer 2026** and will last approximately **3 weeks**. There is payment for participation, as well as a potential cash prize.

Safety and welfare are a huge priority, with measures including an intimacy coordinator, intimacy training for both cast and casting team, and on-set welfare support throughout production.

Applicants must be **single** and aged **20+ as of 27 April 2026**.

My DMs are open if you’d like to have a chat, have any questions, or want to know more.

Ready to apply? Click here:
[https://shortaudition.com/Dating-Naked-UK?origin=Gabe](https://shortaudition.com/Dating-Naked-UK?origin=Gabe)

sharedPost.text:
Ich bin glücklich!

Glücklich über jeden Tag an dem es mir soweit gut geht, glücklich das meine Leidenschaft mein Beruf sein kann, glücklich das ich sein darf was ich bin - ein Mensch! 

Und wenn ich das Mikrofon in die Hand nehme, auf Play drücke und meine Energie, meine Interpretation von Kunst an die Menschen weitergebe die es wertschätzen, dann ist diese kleine Welt in Ordnung.

Ich habe mal die Kamera mitlaufen lassen und euch ein kleines Medley zusammengestellt. 🎶

Worin findet ihr euer tägliches Glück?

Schreibt es in die Kommentare ☀️
.
.
.
#probe #mathiasmariekaiser #glück #livegesang #medley

items.text:
Ich bin glücklich!

Glücklich über jeden Tag an dem es mir soweit gut geht, glücklich das meine Leidenschaft mein Beruf sein kann, glücklich das ich sein darf was ich bin - ein Mensch! 

Und wenn ich das Mikrofon in die Hand nehme, auf Play drücke und meine Energie, meine Interpretation von Kunst an die Menschen weitergebe die es wertschätzen, dann ist diese kleine Welt in Ordnung.

Ich habe mal die Kamera mitlaufen lassen und euch ein kleines Medley zusammengestellt. 🎶

Worin findet ihr euer tägliches Glück?

Schreibt es in die Kommentare ☀️
.
.
.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'THE PANTOMIME ADVENTURES OF Νγγζια ល PAID ACTING ROLES We are looking for 4 key lead roles in our annual Christmas Pantomime! If you are talented musical theatre performer- ameatur or professional we are looking for you! A ditzy dame? A cunning villian? A sweet heroine? A lonely toymaker? See link in our post to find out more! Groundlings ndlingsTheatre,Portsmouth Theatre, Groundlings THIATH'

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL: “DR AMINA [SERIES]”  
Produced by Keba entertainment together with Ushkzan streaming App 
We are looking for passionate, dedicated actors to bring this project to life
  About the series
This is a story about life pressure, the cruelty of life , ambition , greed and crime and a young mother’s response to it.
  Production Details
• Location: Johannesburg, South Africa
• Schedule: AUG –SEP  (Weekends ONLY)
• Professional status: no-name , no agency young actors
• Compensation: Negotiable [daily or  series based rate –based on role] ; cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a professional  team
  Audition Instructions
Please submit a self-taped audition[using your phone] . You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you.
Email: kebaentertainment@kebaaiworld.com
Subject Line: ACTOR: DR AMINA SERIES
  Character Breakdown
PLEASE SEE ATTACHED POSTER
•   Why Be Part of  DR AMINA [series]?

items.text:
*Casting Call!*

We need skilled and talented actors and actresses who are fluent English speakers for these roles:

- *Coach Pascal* (55, male) – University sports coach  
- *Grandmother / Mama Grace* (60s–70s)  
- *Uncle John* (30s)  
- *Tinache’s Mother* (40s) – a real “aunty” type  
- *Minister* (40s) – wedding planner  

Send your profile to Mr. Eddie on 0622634638 to receive an audition script.

*Note:* Submissions close Friday, 5 June. Auditions must be sent by Thursday, 4 June.

Thank you!
